name: forum-pod-desktop
description: Tauri installer that bundles workerd + the Forum Personal Pod PWA.

scripts.prepare:pod: cd ../forum-pod && npm install && npm run build && rm -rf ../desktop/src-tauri/dist && cp -r dist ../desktop/src-tauri/dist
scripts.prepare:airlock: mkdir -p src-tauri/airlock && for f in secure-worker.js pod-do.js pod-signing-web.js session-binding.js unlock-token.js rate-limit.js do-guards.js webauthn-server.js feedback-limits.js secret-compare.js member-hash.js membership-verify.js membership-routes.js pod-sync.js ai-chat.js civic-ai-system-prompt.js; do cp "../forum-pod-airlock/$f" src-tauri/airlock/; done
scripts.prepare: npm run prepare:pod && npm run prepare:airlock
